data.biography:
June B. Wilde is known for her work in all three of the To All The Boys I've Loved Before movies (2018-2020), Final Destination 5 (2011), The Butterfly Effect (2004) and Hope Springs (2003).

June caught the acting bug when, at eight years old, she stood on stage and got her first laugh. From then on, there was no turning back. She went on to perform in numerous stage plays, winning awards for several roles including Annie Sullivan in The Miracle Worker. She trained at the prestigious American Academy of Dramatic Arts in New York City, and has had recurring roles in T.V. including The Exorcist and Charmed.

She has worked opposite Colin Firth, Minnie Driver and Ashton Kutcher. June has an extensive resume performing in Feature Films, T.V. Series, T.V. Movies, Stage, Voice Overs as well as local and international Commercials.
data.name: June B. Wilde

data.biography: Udo Kierspe (October 14, 1944 вҖ“ November 23, 2025), known professionally as Udo Kier, was a German actor. Known primarily as a cult character actor who portrayed eccentric and deviant figures, he appeared in more than 220 films in both leading and supporting roles throughout Europe and the Americas. He collaborated with acclaimed filmmakers such as Lars von Trier, Gus Van Sant, Werner Herzog, Rainer Werner Fassbinder, Walerian Borowczyk, Kleber MendonГ§a Filho, Dario Argento, Tom Shadyac, Charles Matton, Guy Maddin, Alexander Payne, and Paul Morrissey.
data.name: Udo Kier

data.biography: Udo Kier (geboren als Udo Kierspe) war ein deutscher Schauspieler und Synchronsprecher, der seit den 1960er Jahren an Гјber 270 Film- und Fernsehproduktionen mitgewirkt hat. Er war einer der wenigen deutschen Schauspieler, die regelmГӨГҹig in Hollywood drehten. Kier spezialisierte sich dabei besonders auf skurrile Nebenrollen an der Seite groГҹer Stars. Daneben arbeitete er im Independent- und Arthouse-Bereich mit Regisseuren wie Andy Warhol, Lars von Trier, Rainer Werner Fassbinder, Paul Morrissey, Werner Herzog, Christoph Schlingensief und Gus van Sant.
data.name: Udo Kier

data.biography: Udo Kier (Colonia, Alemania 10 de octubre de 1944) es un prolГӯfico actor alemГЎn que ha destacado por sus trabajos en pelГӯculas de Terror y explotaciГіn, como Las torturas del InquisiciГіn (Mark of the Devil), el binomio dirigido por Paul Morrissey de Carne para Frankestein (Flesh for Frankenstein) y Sangre para DrГЎcula (Blood for Dracula) y recientemente por sus trabajos en las pelГӯculas de Lars Von Trier y pequeГұos papeles en pelГӯculas comerciales como Blade o No te preocupes, no llegarГЎ lejos a pie (Don't Worry, He Won't Get Far on Foot) de Gus Van Sant
д№ҢеӨҡВ·еҹәе°”ж–ҜдҪ©пјҲ1944е№ҙ10жңҲ14ж—Ҙ-пјүпјҢдё“дёҡеҗҚз§°дёәд№ҢеӨҡВ·еҹәе°”пјҢеҫ·еӣҪжј”е‘ҳгҖӮ
data.name: д№ҢеӨҡВ·еҹәе°”

data.biography:
Udo Kier (fГёdt 14. oktober 1944 i KГ¶ln, Tyskland) er en tysk skuespiller.

Han har siden sine mange medvirkener i Lars von Triers film fГҘet hГёj kultstatus i Danmark. Har derudover arbejdet sammen med instruktГёrer som Gus Van Sant og Dario Argento.

Udo Kier, (egentlig Udo Kierspe), tysk skuespiller, har mest spillet dГҰmoniske filmroller, bГҘde i Tyskland hos bl.a. Rainer Werner Fassbinder i Lili Marleen (1980), i Danmark hos Lars von Trier i Epidemic (1987) og i Riget (1994, 1997) og i USA i bl.a. Frankenstein (1973), My Own Private Idaho (1991) og Ace Ventura, Pet Detective (1994, Ace Ventura, detektiv).
зғҸеӨҡВ·еҹәдәһж–ҜдҪ©пјҲ1944 е№ҙ 10 жңҲ 14 ж—Ҙ-пјүпјҢе°ҲжҘӯеҗҚзЁұзӮәзғҸеӨҡВ·еҹәдәһпјҢеҫ·еңӢжј”е“ЎгҖӮ
data.name: зғҸеӨҡВ·еҹәдәһ

data.biography: Angourie Rice (/ГҰЕӢЛҲЙЎaКҠri/; born January 1, 2001) is an Australian actress. She began her career as a child actress, coming to attention for her roles in These Final Hours and The Nice Guys. She is known for her portrayal of Betty Brant in the Marvel Cinematic Universe, appearing in Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017), Spider-Man: Far From Home (2019), and Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021). She also has appearing roles in Senior Year (2022) & the broadway adaptation of Mean Girls (2024).
data.name: Angourie Rice

data.biography: Angourie Rice (1 de enero de 2001) es una actriz australiana protagonista en pelГӯculas como These Final Hours y The Nice Guys. Es conocida por interpretar a Betty Brant en el Universo cinematogrГЎfico de Marvel en las pelГӯculas Spider-Man: Homecoming y Spider-Man: Lejos de casa.
Angourie Rice (ur. 1 stycznia 2001 w Perth) вҖ“ australijska aktorka, ktГіra wystД…piЕӮa m.in. w filmach "Na pokuszenie", "Spider-Man: Homecoming" i "Nice Guys. RГіwni goЕӣcie".

Angourie Rice (/ГҰЕӢЛҲЙЎaКҠri/ ; nГ©e le 1er janvier 2001) est une actrice australienne. Elle a commencГ© sa carriГЁre en tant qu'enfant actrice, se faisant remarquer pour ses rГҙles dans Ces derniГЁres heures et Les gentils gars. Elle est connue pour son interprГ©tation de Betty Brant dans l'univers cinГ©matographique Marvel, apparaissant dans Spider-Man : Homecoming (2017), Spider-Man : Far From Home (2019) et Spider-Man : No Way Home (2021).

Angourie Rice (Melbourne, 2001. januГЎr 1. вҖ“) ausztrГЎl szГӯnГ©sznЕ‘.

Legismertebb alakГӯtГЎsa Betty Brant a Marvel-moziuniverzum filmjeiben. ElsЕ‘kГ©nt a 2017-es PГіkember: HazatГ©rГ©s cГӯmЕұ filmben tЕұnt fel, ezt kГ¶vette a PГіkember: Idegenben (2019). 2016-ban a Rendes fickГіk cГӯmЕұ filmben is jГЎtszott.

Melbourne-ben szГјletett, Jeremy Rice rendezЕ‘ Г©s Kate Rice ГӯrГі gyermekekГ©nt. Г–t Г©vig Perthben Г©lt Г©s egy Г©vet MГјnchenben, majd visszatГ©rt Melbourne-be.

рҹ’ҘРӯРҪРіР°СғСҖРё Р Р°Р№СҒ. Р РҫРҙРёР»Р°СҒСҢ РІ 2001-РҫРј РіРҫРҙСғ РІ РЎРёРҙРҪРөРө, РҗРІСҒСӮСҖР°Р»РёСҸ. Р РҫСҒР»Р° РІ СҒРөРјСҢРө СҒ РјР»Р°РҙСҲРёРј РұСҖР°СӮРҫРј. РһСӮРөСҶ СҖР°РұРҫСӮР°Р» СҖРөР¶РёСҒСҒС‘СҖРҫРј, Р° РјР°СӮСҢ РұСӢР»Р° РҝРёСҒР°СӮРөР»СҢРҪРёСҶРөР№. РЈСҮРёР»Р°СҒСҢ РІ РҹСҖРёРҪСҶРөСҒ РҘРёР»Р» РҡРҫР»Р»РөРҙР¶ РІ РңРөР»СҢРұСғСҖРҪРө. Р Р°РұРҫСӮР°РөСӮ Р°РәСӮСҖРёСҒРҫР№. РӣРёСҮРҪСғСҺ Р¶РёР·РҪСҢ РҝСҖРөРҙРҝРҫСҮРёСӮР°РөСӮ РҙРөСҖР¶Р°СӮСҢ РІ СӮР°Р№РҪРө

рҹҸҶР“Р»Р°РІРҪСӢРө РҪР°РіСҖР°РҙСӢрҹҸҶ: РқРҫРјРёРҪР°СҶРёСҸ РҪР° Critics Choice Awards (2024) [Р”СҖСҸРҪРҪСӢРө РҙРөРІСҮРҫРҪРәРё]

рҹҺ¬Р“Р»Р°РІРҪСӢРө РҝСҖРҫРөРәСӮСӢрҹҺ¬: В«Р§РөР»РҫРІРөРә-РҝР°СғРә: Р’РҫР·РІСҖР°СүРөРҪРёРө РҙРҫРјРҫР№В» (2017), В«РһРұСүРөСҒСӮРІРҫ РһРҪРҫСҖВ» (2022), В«Р”СҖСҸРҪРҪСӢРө РҙРөРІСҮРҫРҪРәРёВ» (2024)

data.biography:
Angourie Rice, 1 Ocak 2001 tarihinde Sidney, Avustralya'da dГјnyaya geldi. YГ¶netmen bir baba (Jeremy Rice) ve yazar bir annenin (Kate Rice) kДұzДұ olarak sanatla iГ§ iГ§e bir ortamda bГјyГјdГј. Ailesinin iЕҹleri nedeniyle bir sГјre Perth'te yaЕҹadДұktan sonra Melbourne'e yerleЕҹti. Oyunculuk kariyerine kГјГ§Гјk yaЕҹlarda Avustralya yapДұmДұ kДұsa filmlerle baЕҹladДұ.

Profesyonel kariyerindeki ilk Г¶nemli Г§ДұkДұЕҹДұnДұ, 2013 yapДұmДұ apokaliptik gerilim filmi "KДұyamet Gecesi" (These Final Hours) ile yaptДұ. Bu filmdeki performansДұyla uluslararasДұ alanda dikkat Г§ekmeye baЕҹladДұ. Ancak ona asДұl ЕҹГ¶hreti getiren rol, 2016 yДұlДұnda Russell Crowe ve Ryan Gosling ile birlikte rol aldДұДҹДұ, eleЕҹtirmenlerce beДҹenilen neo-noir komedi filmi "Д°yi Adamlar" (The Nice Guys) oldu. Filmde canlandДұrdДұДҹДұ Holly March karakteriyle bГјyГјk beДҹeni topladДұ ve Hollywood'un yГјkselen genГ§ yetenekleri arasДұnda gГ¶sterilmeye baЕҹlandДұ.

2017 yДұlДұnda, Sofia Coppola'nДұn yГ¶nettiДҹi "The Beguiled" filminde yer aldДұ. AynДұ yДұl, Marvel Sinematik Evreni'ne (MCU) katДұlarak "Г–rГјmcek-Adam: Eve DГ¶nГјЕҹ" (Spider-Man: Homecoming) filminde Peter Parker'Дұn lise arkadaЕҹДұ Betty Brant karakterini canlandДұrdДұ. Bu rolГјnГј "Г–rГјmcek-Adam: Evden Uzakta" (Spider-Man: Far From Home) (2019) ve "Г–rГјmcek-Adam: Eve DГ¶nГјЕҹ Yok" (Spider-Man: No Way Home) (2021) filmlerinde de tekrarlayarak kГјresel tanДұnДұrlДұДҹДұnДұ pekiЕҹtirdi.

2018'de fantastik romantik drama "Her GГјn" (Every Day) filminde baЕҹrol oynadДұ. Televizyon tarafДұnda ise 2019'da "Black Mirror" dizisinin beЕҹinci sezonundaki "Rachel, Jack and Ashley Too" bГ¶lГјmГјnde Miley Cyrus ile birlikte rol aldДұ. 2021 yДұlДұnda, Kate Winslet'in baЕҹrolГјnde olduДҹu, eleЕҹtirmenlerce beДҹenilen HBO mini dizisi "Mare of Easttown"da, Winslet'in karakterinin kДұzДұ Siobhan Sheehan rolГјnГј Гјstlendi ve bu performansДұyla dramatik yГ¶nГјnГј de gГјГ§lГј bir Еҹekilde sergiledi.

2022'de Rebel Wilson'Дұn baЕҹrolГјnde olduДҹu Netflix komedisi "Lise YДұllДұДҹДұ" (Senior Year) filminde genГ§ karakteri canlandДұrdДұ. 2024 yДұlДұnda ise ikonik 2004 filminin mГјzikal uyarlamasДұ olan "KГ¶tГј KДұzlar" (Mean Girls) filminde Cady Heron karakteriyle baЕҹrol oynayarak kariyerindeki yГјkseliЕҹini sГјrdГјrdГј.

data.biography: Eric Wan Tin-Chiu (Chinese: е°№еӨ©з…§, born 28 October 1964) is a Hong Kong television actor best known for his role as "Fong Tin-yau" in the My Date with a Vampire television series trilogy produced by the Hong Kong television network ATV. Wan began his acting career after graduating from the ATV Training Course in 1983. He started as a host in television programmes for children before entering the drama department. He has since acted in many films and television series.

data.biography:
Austin Haynes is a British child actor best known for playing Thomas in The Railway Children Return (2022).

Austin landed his first cast TV role within a year of taking up acting, in popular BBC1 drama The A Word, where he plays the role of Olly Chapman. Since then Austin has worked consistently in film and television.

Austin is a keen guitarist and his first breakthrough role was busking on the streets in the iconic Co-op advert for Christmas in 2020 to Oasis' Round Are Way with younger brother, Rocco.
data.name: Austin Haynes

data.biography:
Deborah Ann Woll (born February 7, 1985) is an American actress. She played Jessica Hamby in the HBO drama series True Blood (2008вҖ“2014), which earned her a nomination for a Screen Actors Guild Award. She also portrayed Karen Page in the Marvel Cinematic Universe series Daredevil (2015вҖ“2018), The Defenders (2017), The Punisher (2017вҖ“2019), and Daredevil: Born Again (2025). Her film roles include Mother's Day (2010), Seven Days in Utopia (2011), Someday This Pain Will Be Useful to You (2011), Catch .44 (2011), Ruby Sparks (2012), Meet Me in Montenegro (2014), The Automatic Hate (2015), and Escape Room (2019) and its 2021 sequel. In 2022, she provided the voice and motion capture of Faye in the video game God of War RagnarГ¶k.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Deborah Ann Woll, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Deborah Ann Woll

data.biography:
Deborah Ann Woll (Brooklyn, Nueva York, 7 de febrero de 1985) es una actriz estadounidense conocida por las series True Blood (2008) y Marvel's Daredevil (2015).

Woll, apareciГі en diversas series como en El Mentalista, Life, Me llamo Earl y CSI: Crime Scene Investigation, pero su oportunidad llegГі cuando se presentГі al casting de la serie True Blood para realizar el papel de Jessica Hamby, siendo seleccionada. Para adaptarse mГЎs al personaje, se tiГұГі el pelo de rojo.

Gracias a su participaciГіn en True Blood, comenzГі a obtener una mayor fama y llegГі a ganar un Satellite Awards. ApareciГі en pelГӯculas como Mother's Day, interpretando a Lidia Koffin; en Catch. 44, Highland Park y Ruby Sparks.

En 2014, se confirmГі que Deborah interpretarГӯa a Karen Page en la serie original de Netflix: Marvel's Daredevil; despuГ©s de su estreno y debido a su gran Г©xito, Netflix consiguiГі mГЎs de 62 millones de clientes.

DespuГ©s de True Blood, Deborah apareciГі en varios programas como Good Day L.A., Hell's Kitchen y Big Morning Buzz Live. TambiГ©n obtuvo popularidad en internet por su pequeГұo blog True Blood:Jessica's Blog, donde interpreta a Jessica Hamby siguiendo la historia de la pequeГұa vampiresa. Ha aparecido en revistas como Bello y Nylon Magazine.

Deborah Ann Woll urodziЕӮa siДҷ 7 lutego 1985 roku na Brooklynie. Jest pГіЕӮ NiemkД… i pГіЕӮ IrlandkД…. W latach dzieciДҷcych przeniosЕӮa siДҷ do Los Angeles gdzie w 2007 roku ukoЕ„czyЕӮa University of Southern California. Deborah od najmЕӮodszych lat miaЕӮa talent do gry aktorskiej i muzyki. Wpierw rozwijaЕӮa swoje talenty muzyczne, uczД…c siДҷ gry na pianinie. Z poczД…tku siДҷ wahaЕӮa w ktГіrym zawodzie powinna "zapuЕӣciДҮ korzenie". Ostatecznie wybraЕӮa aktorstwo. Niemal od razu Deborah rozpoczДҷЕӮa pracДҷ nad swoimi umiejДҷtnoЕӣciami, ДҮwiczyЕӮa mimikДҷ, sЕӮownictwo, a takЕјe na castingach podpatrywaЕӮa starsze koleЕјanki po fachu. Jej zaangaЕјowanie i energiДҷ zauwaЕјyli producenci serialu "Life" i wЕӮaЕӣnie w nim, w 2007 roku Wall zadebiutowaЕӮa na maЕӮym ekranie. Przez nastДҷpny rok jej kariera rozwijaЕӮa siДҷ powoli, aЕј do czasu gdy dostaЕӮa rolДҷ w kultowym juЕј serialu "True Blood" (Czysta krew). WcieliЕӮa siДҷ tam w dziewczynДҷ imieniem Jessica, ktГіra zostaЕӮa przemieniona w wampira nie z wЕӮasnej woli. W roli butnej Jessici, Deborah spisaЕӮa siДҷ tak dobrze, Ејe zaczДҷЕӮa dostawaДҮ swoje pierwsze propozycje filmowe. SwojД… nieprzeciДҷtnД… urodД…, a takЕјe swojД… ЕӣwietnД… grД… aktorskД… zyskaЕӮa licznych fanГіw, a takЕјe daЕӮa dowГіd na to, Ејe o niej dЕӮugo nie zapomnimy.

Deborah Ann Woll nasceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1985 em Brooklyn, Nova York. Seu pai Г© arquiteto e sua mГЈe, Cathy Woll, Г© professora na Berkeley Carroll School. Deborah Г© descendente de irlandeses e alemГЈes, cresceu no Brooklyn, Nova Iorque, estudando no colГ©gio local Packer Collegiate Institute. Seu pai Г© arquiteto e sua mГЈe Г© professora.

Ela se matriculou no programa de artes finas no USC School of Theatre da University of Southern California, onde estudou atuaГ§ГЈo e se formou em 2007, desde entГЈo se mudou para Los Angeles.

TambГ©m fez um programa intensivo de Shakespeare na Royal Academy of Dramatic Arts, em Londres, Inglaterra. Frequentou programa intensivo prГ©-vestibular da Universidade Carnegie Mellonem teatro.

ComeГ§ou a se destacar a partir de pequenas participaГ§Гөes em sГ©ries de sucesso, como PlantГЈo MГ©dico e CSI: InvestigaГ§ГЈo Criminal, em 2008, alГ©m de O Mentalista e Lei & Ordem, ambos em 2009. Debutou na tela grande com Dominados Pelo Г“dio (2010). Entretanto, alГ§ou fama internacional ao estrelar ao seriado True Blood, entre os anos de 2008 e 2014. TambГ©m atuou como Karen Page em Demolidor (2015-2018), e o Justiceiro (Primeira temporada)

Deborah Ann Woll (Brooklyn, 1985. februГЎr 7. вҖ“) amerikai szГӯnГ©sznЕ‘.

TelevГӯziГіs szerepei kГ¶zt talГЎlhatГі a vГЎmpГӯr Jessica Hamby a HBO True Blood вҖ“ Inni Г©s Г©lni hagyni (2008вҖ“2014), valamint Karen Page a Netflix Marvel-moziuniverzumban jГЎtszГіdГі Daredevil (2015вҖ“2018), The Defenders (2017) Г©s The Punisher (2017вҖ“) cГӯmЕұ sorozataiban.

Filmes szereplГ©sei voltak tГ¶bbek kГ¶zГ¶tt az AnyГЎk napja (2010), a SzellemtanГә (2011), a Dupla csapda (2011), a FejbenjГЎrГі bЕұn (2012) Г©s a VГ©gtelen ГәtvesztЕ‘ (2019) cГӯmЕұ filmekben.
